mapper.select:
SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y/%m/%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , early.uce_use_yn AS uce_use_yn , CASE WHEN evently.uec_ucm_code IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS badge_e , CASE WHEN popular.ucm_code IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS badge_p , CASE WHEN contents_master.UCM_REGDATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS badge_n
FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK library_ebook LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master ON library_ebook.UIE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTENTS_EARLY early ON early.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND early.UCE_USE_YN = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN early.UCE_START_DT AND early.UCE_END_DT LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ec.uec_ucm_code FROM TBL_EVENT_MASTER em JOIN TBL_EVENT_CONTENT ec ON em.uem_code = ec.uec_uem_code WHERE (em.uem_uis_code IS NULL OR em.uem_uis_code = #{searchUisCode}) AND NOW() BETWEEN em.UEM_DISPLAY_STARTDATE AND em.UEM_DISPLAY_ENDDATE ) evently ON evently.uec_ucm_code = contents_master.UCM_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tdpl.ucm_code , ROUND(( ((SUM(tdpl.read_cnt) * 0.35) + ((SUM(tdpl.read_time) / 3600) * 0.10) + (AVG(tdpl.read_percent) * 0.20) + (SUM(tdpl.order_cnt) * 0.35)) / 100),2) AS score FROM TBL_DAILY_POPULAR_LOG tdpl WHERE tdpl.LOG_YMD = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY tdpl.ucm_code ORDER BY score DESC limit 30 ) popular ON popular.UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE AND return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE = library_ebook.UIE_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{searchUisCode} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE library_ebook.UIE_UIL_CODE = #{uil_code} AND UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{searchUisCode}
AND UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'

SELECT count(contents_master.UCM_CODE) FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND V.uce_ucm_code is null AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y'
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE LIKE CONCAT(LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8), '%')
AND substring(contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE, 4,1) = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_CODE IN (SELECT UIE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK WHERE UIE_UIL_CODE = #{uil_code})
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'

SELECT count(contents_master.UCM_CODE) FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND V.uce_ucm_code is null AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y'
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE LIKE CONCAT(LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8), '%')
AND substring(contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE, 4,1) = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_CODE IN (SELECT UIE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK WHERE UIE_UIL_CODE = #{uil_code})
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE AS ucm_ucp_code , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro , contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , IFNULL(library.UME_CODE, '') AS ume_code , contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn , (SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UME_READ_STATUS = 'R' AND UME_STATUS = 'A') AS ucm_read_count FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK library ON library.UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND library.UME_UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND library.UME_STATUS = 'A'
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND V.uce_ucm_code is null AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y'
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE LIKE CONCAT(LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8), '%')
AND substring(contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE, 4,1) = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_CODE IN (SELECT UIE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK WHERE UIE_UIL_CODE = #{uil_code})
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
ORDER BY
contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_ebook_pubdate DESC, contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_download_count DESC, contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_title ASC
contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}
SELECT UIL_NAME FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_MASTER WHERE UIL_CODE = #{uil_code} LIMIT 1

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_COVER_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_INTRO_IMG_URL AS ucm_intro_img_url , contents_master.UCM_INTRO_MOVIE_URL AS ucm_intro_movie_url , (SELECT UCT_TYPE FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER WHERE UCT_CODE = contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE) AS uct_type , (SELECT UCT_NAME FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER WHERE UCT_CODE = CONCAT(LEFT(contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE, 8), '00000')) AS uct_parent_name , (SELECT UCT_NAME FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER WHERE UCT_CODE = contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE) AS uct_name , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate , (SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UME_READ_STATUS = 'R' AND UME_STATUS = 'A') AS ucm_read_count , library_book.UME_CODE AS ume_code , library_book.UME_STATUS AS ume_status , IFNULL(library_book.UME_FINISHREAD_COUNT, 0) AS ume_finishread_count , (SELECT UBR_CODE FROM TBL_BOOK_REPORT WHERE UBR_UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND UBR_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UBR_UME_CODE = library_book.UME_CODE) AS ubr_code , (SELECT UCD_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENT_DISCUSSION WHERE UCD_UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND UCD_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE LIMIT 1) AS ucd_code , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , IFNULL(contents_master.UCM_TEXT_COUNT, 0) AS ucm_text_count , IFNULL(contents_master.UCM_FILESIZE, 0) AS ucm_filesize , contents_master.UCM_TOTAL_PLAYTIME AS ucm_total_playtime , contents_master.UCM_PAPER_PAGES AS ucm_paper_pages , contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , contents_master.UCM_TOC AS ucm_toc , contents_master.UCM_REVIEW AS ucm_review , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISH_REVIEW AS ucm_publish_review
,(select library_master.UIL_CODE from TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_MASTER library_master join TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK library_ebook on library_master.UIL_CODE = library_ebook.UIE_UIL_CODE and library_ebook.UIE_UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} and library_master.UIL_UIS_CODE in (#{uis_code},'') AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_ENDDATE >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP limit 1 ) AS uil_code ,(select library_master.UIL_NAME from TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_MASTER library_master join TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK library_ebook on library_master.UIL_CODE = library_ebook.UIE_UIL_CODE and library_ebook.UIE_UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} and library_master.UIL_UIS_CODE in (#{uis_code},'') AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_ENDDATE >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP limit 1 ) AS uil_name
,(select library_master.UIL_CODE from TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_MASTER library_master join TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK library_ebook on library_master.UIL_CODE = library_ebook.UIE_UIL_CODE and library_ebook.UIE_UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} and library_master.UIL_UIS_CODE in (#{uis_code}) AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_ENDDATE >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP limit 1 ) AS uil_code ,(select library_master.UIL_NAME from TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_MASTER library_master join TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK library_ebook on library_master.UIL_CODE = library_ebook.UIE_UIL_CODE and library_ebook.UIE_UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} and library_master.UIL_UIS_CODE in (#{uis_code}) AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_ENDDATE >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP limit 1 ) AS uil_name
, contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE AS ucm_ucp_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_SUPPORT_TTS AS ucm_support_tts , contents_master.UCM_PREVIEW_FLAG AS ucm_preview_flag , (SELECT COUNT(UCLC_CODE) FROM TBL_CONTENTS_LIKE_COMMENT WHERE UCLC_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UCLC_TYPE = 'Y') AS uclc_like , (SELECT DISTINCT UCLC_TYPE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_LIKE_COMMENT WHERE UCLC_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UCLC_UM_CODE = #{um_code}) AS uclc_type , (SELECT DISTINCT UCLC_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_LIKE_COMMENT WHERE UCLC_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UCLC_UM_CODE = #{um_code} limit 1) AS uclc_code , contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn , contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG AS ucm_copy_book_flag , (SELECT UIS_COPY_BOOK_FLAG FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER WHERE UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}) AS uis_copy_book_flag , (SELECT UIS_RETURN_FLAG FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER WHERE UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}) AS uis_return_flag , (SELECT UIS_RETURN_UI_FLAG FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER WHERE UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}) AS uis_return_ui_flag , (SELECT UIS_PREVIEW_FLAG FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER WHERE UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}) AS uis_preview_flag , EXISTS(SELECT UICE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_COPY_EBOOK WHERE UICE_UCM_CODE = ucm_code AND UICE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}) AS copy_book_flag , EXISTS(SELECT UDR_CODE FROM TBL_ORDER_MASTER WHERE UDR_UCM_CODE = ucm_code AND UDR_UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND DATE_FORMAT(UDR_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') limit 1) AS copy_order_exist
, ( (SELECT UICE_COPY FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_COPY_EBOOK WHERE UICE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UICE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}) - (SELECT COUNT(UDR_CODE) FROM TBL_ORDER_MASTER WHERE UDR_UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} AND UDR_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} AND DATE_FORMAT(UDR_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'))) AS today_copy_count
, ( (SELECT URC_COPY FROM TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS WHERE URC_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}) - (SELECT COUNT(UDR_CODE) FROM TBL_ORDER_MASTER WHERE UDR_UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} AND UDR_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} AND DATE_FORMAT(UDR_STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND DATE_FORMAT(UDR_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) AS today_copy_count
FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY member_library ON member_library.UML_UM_CODE = #{um_code} LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK library_book ON member_library.UML_CODE = library_book.UME_UML_CODE AND contents_master.UCM_CODE = library_book.UME_UCM_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1 AND contents_master.UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} LIMIT 1

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_COVER_URL AS ucm_cover_url , (SELECT UCT_TYPE FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER WHERE UCT_CODE = contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE) AS uct_type , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE AS ucm_ucp_code FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master WHERE 1 = 1 AND contents_master.UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} LIMIT 1

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_DOWNLOAD_COUNT AS totalCount
FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y'
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND V.uce_ucm_code is null AND contents_master.UCM_CODE != #{ucm_code} AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE LIKE CONCAT(LEFT(#{ucm_uct_code}, 8), '%') ORDER BY totalCount DESC, contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC LIMIT 12
mapper.update:
SELECT MAX(SEQ_CURRVAL)+1 FROM TBL_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQ_NAME = #{seq_name}
UPDATE TBL_SEQUENCES SET SEQ_CURRVAL = #{seq_currval} WHERE SEQ_NAME = #{seq_name}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(UML_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY WHERE UML_UM_CODE = #{uml_um_code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY ( UML_CODE, UML_UM_CODE, UML_NAME ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UML',LPAD(#{uml_code},10,'0')), #{uml_um_code}, '내서재' )

INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK ( UME_CODE, UME_UML_CODE, UME_UM_CODE, UME_UCM_CODE, UME_INPUT_DATE ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UME', substring(#{ume_ucm_code}, 4, 13), substring(#{uml_um_code}, 3, 13), LPAD(#{ume_code},19,'0')), CONCAT('UML',LPAD(#{uml_code},10,'0')), #{uml_um_code}, #{ume_ucm_code}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UML_CODE = #{uml_code} AND UME_UCM_CODE = #{ume_ucm_code}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER SET UCM_READBOOK_COUNT = IFNULL(UCM_READBOOK_COUNT, 0) + 1 WHERE UCM_CODE = #{ume_ucm_code}
mapper.select: SELECT UML_CODE AS uml_code , UML_UM_CODE AS uml_um_code , UML_NAME AS uml_name , UML_PWD AS uml_pwd , UML_BOOK_COUNT AS uml_book_count , UML_TYPE AS uml_type , UML_REGDATE AS uml_regdate FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY WHERE UML_UM_CODE = #{uml_um_code} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK ( UME_CODE, UME_UML_CODE, UME_UM_CODE, UME_UCM_CODE, UME_INPUT_DATE ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UME', substring(#{ume_ucm_code}, 4, 13), substring(#{uml_um_code}, 3, 13), LPAD(#{ume_code},19,'0')), #{ume_uml_code}, #{uml_um_code}, #{ume_ucm_code}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT UME_CODE AS ume_code , UME_UML_CODE AS ume_uml_code , UME_UCM_CODE AS ume_ucm_code , UME_UDR_CODE AS ume_udr_code , UME_SEQ AS ume_seq , UME_LAST_READ_PERCENT AS ume_last_read_percent , UME_LAST_READ_IDX AS ume_last_read_idx , UME_LAST_READ_POSITION AS ume_last_read_position , UME_LAST_READ_DATE AS ume_last_read_date , UME_FINISHREAD_COUNT AS ume_finishread_count , UME_FINISHREAD_DATE AS ume_finishread_date , UME_READ_STATUS AS ume_read_status , UME_ISLOCK AS ume_islock , UME_PASSWORD AS ume_password , UME_STATUS AS ume_status , UME_ISDOWNLOAD AS ume_isdownload , UME_RATE AS ume_rate , UME_RATE_MEMO AS ume_rate_memo , UME_MOD_DATE AS ume_mod_date , UME_REGDATE AS ume_regdate FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK
WHERE UME_UML_CODE = #{uml_code} AND UME_UCM_CODE = #{ume_ucm_code} LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK SET UME_STATUS = #{ume_status} , UME_ISDOWNLOAD = 'N' , UME_MOD_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE UME_CODE = #{ume_code}

UPDATE TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK SET UME_STATUS = #{ume_status} , UME_ISDOWNLOAD = 'N' , UME_MOD_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE UME_CODE IN
#{item}
mapper.select:
SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_thumb_url , contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro , IFNULL(library.UME_CODE, '') AS ume_code , contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn , (SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UME_READ_STATUS = 'R' AND UME_STATUS = 'A') AS ucm_read_count
FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category_master ON contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = category_master.UCT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK library ON library.UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND library.UME_UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND library.UME_STATUS = 'A'
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND category_master.UCT_TYPE = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_MAIN_CODE = LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8)
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = #{uct_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND category_master.UCT_TYPE != 'C' ORDER BY
contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_ebook_pubdate DESC, contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_download_count DESC, contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_title ASC
contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_thumb_url , contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , contents_master.UCM_READ_COUNT AS ucm_read_count , contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro , contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn
FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category_master ON contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = category_master.UCT_CODE
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND category_master.UCT_TYPE = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE LIKE CONCAT(LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8), '%')
AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
ORDER BY contents_master.UCM_READBOOK_COUNT DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro , IFNULL(library.UME_CODE, '') AS ume_code , contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn , (SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UME_READ_STATUS = 'R' AND UME_STATUS = 'A') AS ucm_read_count , ROUND(( (agg.read_cnt * 0.35) + ((agg.read_time / 3600) * 0.10) + (agg.read_percent * 0.20) + (agg.order_cnt * 0.35) ) / 100, 2) AS score
FROM ( SELECT tdpl.ucm_code, SUM(tdpl.read_cnt) AS read_cnt, SUM(tdpl.read_time) AS read_time, AVG(tdpl.read_percent) AS read_percent, SUM(tdpl.order_cnt) AS order_cnt FROM TBL_DAILY_POPULAR_LOG tdpl WHERE
tdpl.LOG_YMD >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND tdpl.LOG_YMD < CURDATE()
tdpl.LOG_YMD >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND tdpl.LOG_YMD < CURDATE()
tdpl.LOG_YMD >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND tdpl.LOG_YMD < CURDATE()
tdpl.LOG_YMD >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND tdpl.LOG_YMD < CURDATE()
AND tdpl.UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
GROUP BY tdpl.ucm_code ) agg JOIN TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master ON contents_master.ucm_code = agg.ucm_code LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category_master ON contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = category_master.UCT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK library ON library.UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND library.UME_UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND library.UME_STATUS = 'A'
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND category_master.UCT_TYPE = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_MAIN_CODE = LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8)
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = #{uct_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , contents_master.UCM_READ_COUNT AS ucm_read_count , contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro , contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn
FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category_master ON contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = category_master.UCT_CODE
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND category_master.UCT_TYPE = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE LIKE CONCAT(LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8), '%')
AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
ORDER BY contents_master.UCM_READBOOK_COUNT DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro , IFNULL(library.UME_CODE, '') AS ume_code , contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn , (SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UME_READ_STATUS = 'R' AND UME_STATUS = 'A') AS ucm_read_count , ROUND(( (agg.read_cnt * 0.35) + ((agg.read_time / 3600) * 0.10) + (agg.read_percent * 0.20) + (agg.order_cnt * 0.35) ) / 100, 2) AS score
FROM ( SELECT tdpl.ucm_code, SUM(tdpl.read_cnt) AS read_cnt, SUM(tdpl.read_time) AS read_time, AVG(tdpl.read_percent) AS read_percent, SUM(tdpl.order_cnt) AS order_cnt FROM TBL_DAILY_POPULAR_LOG tdpl WHERE
tdpl.LOG_YMD >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND tdpl.LOG_YMD < CURDATE()
tdpl.LOG_YMD >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND tdpl.LOG_YMD < CURDATE()
tdpl.LOG_YMD >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND tdpl.LOG_YMD < CURDATE()
tdpl.LOG_YMD >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND tdpl.LOG_YMD < CURDATE()
AND tdpl.UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
GROUP BY tdpl.ucm_code ) agg JOIN TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = agg.ucm_code LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category_master ON contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = category_master.UCT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK library ON library.UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND library.UME_UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND library.UME_STATUS = 'A'
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND category_master.UCT_TYPE = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_MAIN_CODE = LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8)
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = #{uct_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT COUNT(UCM_CODE) AS totalBookCount FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1 AND UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code , contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn , contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title , contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title , contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer , contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand , DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate , contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url , contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code , contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type , contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age , contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code , contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no , contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro , IFNULL(library.UME_CODE, '') AS ume_code , contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn , (SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UME_READ_STATUS = 'R' AND UME_STATUS = 'A') AS ucm_read_count
FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category_master ON contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = category_master.UCT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK library ON library.UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND library.UME_UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND library.UME_STATUS = 'A'
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND category_master.UCT_TYPE = #{uct_type}
AND contents_master.UCM_MAIN_CODE = LEFT(#{uct_code}, 8)
AND contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE = #{uct_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND category_master.UCT_TYPE != 'C' ORDER BY
contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_ebook_pubdate DESC, contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_download_count DESC, contents_master.UCM_REGDATE DESC
contents_master.ucm_title ASC
contents_master.ucm_ebook_pubdate DESC
LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(notice.UN_NO) AS count FROM TBL_NOTICE notice WHERE 1 = 1 AND notice.UN_NOTICE_TYPE = 'N' AND ( notice.UN_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} OR notice.UN_UIS_CODE = '' )

SELECT notice.UN_NO AS un_no , notice.UN_TITLE AS un_title , notice.UN_UIS_CODE AS un_uis_code , notice.UN_CONTENT AS un_content , notice.UN_AM_USERID AS un_am_userid , DATE_FORMAT(notice.UN_REGDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS un_regdate FROM TBL_NOTICE notice WHERE 1 = 1 AND notice.UN_NOTICE_TYPE = 'N' AND notice.UN_USEYN = 'N' AND ( notice.UN_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} OR notice.UN_UIS_CODE = '' ) ORDER BY notice.UN_REGDATE DESC LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}
SELECT UTS_CONTENT AS uts_content FROM TBL_TOS WHERE UTS_TYPE = 'M' ORDER BY UTS_NO DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT UPP_CONTENT AS upp_content FROM TBL_PRIVACY_POLICY WHERE UPP_TYPE = 'M' ORDER BY UPP_NO DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(contents_master.UCM_CODE) AS count FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
JOIN TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category_master ON category_master.UCT_CODE = contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1 AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND LEFT(category_master.UCT_CODE,8) = LEFT(#{uct_code},8)
AND contents_master.ucm_file_type in ('EPUB','PDF')
AND contents_master.ucm_file_type in ('AUDIO')
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE NOT IN ('UCP0000000425','UCP0000000013')
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') )
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') )
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') )
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') )
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') )

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code, contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn, contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title, contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title, contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer, contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand, DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate, contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url, contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code, contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type, contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age, contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code, contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no, (SELECT COUNT(UCM_CODE) FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER WHERE ucm_ucs_code != '' AND UCM_UCS_CODE = contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AND UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' ) AS ucm_series_count,
LOCATE(#{searchName}, REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE, ' ', '')) AS relevance_score,
LOCATE(#{searchName}, REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE, ' ', '')) AS relevance_score,
LOCATE(#{searchName}, REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE, ' ', '')) AS relevance_score,
LOCATE(#{searchName}, REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER, ' ', '')) AS relevance_score,
LOCATE(#{searchName}, REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER, ' ', '')) AS relevance_score,
-- 우선순위 계산 CASE WHEN REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE, ' ', '') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', '한겨레', '%') THEN 1 WHEN REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER, ' ', '') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', '한겨레', '%') THEN 2 WHEN REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER, ' ', '') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', '한겨레', '%') THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS search_priority, contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro, contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn, member_library_book.ume_code AS ume_code, (SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UME_READ_STATUS = 'R' AND UME_STATUS = 'A') AS ucm_read_count FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK member_library_book ON member_library_book.UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND member_library_book.UME_STATUS = 'A' AND member_library_book.UME_UM_CODE = #{um_code}
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
JOIN TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category_master ON category_master.UCT_CODE = contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND LEFT(category_master.UCT_CODE,8) = LEFT(#{uct_code},8)
AND contents_master.ucm_file_type in ('EPUB','PDF')
AND contents_master.ucm_file_type in ('AUDIO')
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE NOT IN ('UCP0000000425','UCP0000000013')
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') ) ORDER BY search_priority ASC, relevance_score ASC, contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE DESC
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') ) ORDER BY search_priority ASC, -- 우선순위별 정렬 relevance_score ASC, -- 추가적으로 relevance_score로 정렬 contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE DESC -- 마지막으로 제목 정렬
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') ) ORDER BY search_priority ASC, -- 우선순위별 정렬 relevance_score ASC, -- 추가적으로 relevance_score로 정렬 contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE DESC -- 마지막으로 제목 정렬
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') ) ORDER BY search_priority ASC, -- 우선순위별 정렬 relevance_score ASC, -- 추가적으로 relevance_score로 정렬 contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE DESC -- 마지막으로 제목 정렬
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') ) ORDER BY search_priority ASC, -- 우선순위별 정렬 relevance_score ASC, -- 추가적으로 relevance_score로 정렬 contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE DESC -- 마지막으로 제목 정렬
LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}

SELECT contents_master.UCM_CODE AS ucm_code, contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_ISBN AS ucm_ebook_isbn, contents_master.UCM_TITLE AS ucm_title, contents_master.UCM_SUB_TITLE AS ucm_sub_title, contents_master.UCM_WRITER AS ucm_writer, contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER AS ucp_brand, DATE_FORMAT(contents_master.UCM_EBOOK_PUBDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS ucm_ebook_pubdate, contents_master.UCM_THUMB_URL AS ucm_cover_url, contents_master.UCM_UCT_CODE AS ucm_uct_code, contents_master.UCM_FILE_TYPE AS ucm_file_type, contents_master.UCM_LIMIT_AGE AS ucm_limit_age, contents_master.UCM_UCS_CODE AS ucm_ucs_code, contents_master.UCM_SERIES_NO AS ucm_series_no, contents_master.UCM_INTRO AS ucm_intro, contents_master.UCM_WEBDRM2_YN AS ucm_webdrm_yn, member_library_book.ume_code AS ume_code, (SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND UME_READ_STATUS = 'R' AND UME_STATUS = 'A') AS ucm_read_count FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK member_library_book ON member_library_book.UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE AND member_library_book.UME_STATUS = 'A' AND member_library_book.UME_UM_CODE = #{um_code} WHERE 1 = 1
AND contents_master.UCM_CODE IN
#{item}
AND 1 = 0
order by
contents_master.ucm_readbook_count desc
contents_master.ucm_regdate desc
contents_master.ucm_ebook_pubdate desc
contents_master.ucm_readbook_count desc

SELECT COUNT(A.UME_CODE) AS count FROM( SELECT member_library_book.UME_CODE AS UME_CODE FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK member_library_book LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY member_library ON member_library.UML_CODE = member_library_book.UME_UML_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master ON member_library_book.UME_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE AND return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE = member_library_book.UME_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE member_library.UML_TYPE = 'D' AND member_library_book.UME_STATUS = 'A' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE NOT IN ('UCP0000000425','UCP0000000013')
AND ( REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') ) group by member_library_book.UME_UCM_CODE ) A

SELECT COUNT(A.UBR_CODE) AS COUNT FROM( SELECT COUNT(book_report.UBR_CODE) AS UBR_CODE FROM TBL_BOOK_REPORT book_report LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master ON book_report.UBR_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE AND return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE = book_report.UBR_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1 AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y' AND V.uce_ucm_code is null
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND contents_master.UCM_UCP_CODE NOT IN ('UCP0000000425','UCP0000000013')
AND (book_report.UBR_IS_OPEN = 'Y' OR (book_report.UBR_IS_OPEN ='N' AND book_report.UBR_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code})) AND ( REPLACE(book_report.UBR_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_TITLE,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_WRITER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') OR REPLACE(contents_master.UCM_PUBLISHER,' ','') COLLATE utf8_general_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') ) GROUP BY book_report.UBR_UCM_CODE ) A
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONTENTS_LIKE_COMMENT ( UCLC_CODE, UCLC_UCM_CODE, UCLC_UM_CODE, UCLC_TYPE ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UCLC',LPAD(#{uclc_code},18,'0')), #{uclc_ucm_code}, #{um_code}, 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT UCLC_CODE AS uclc_code , UCLC_UCM_CODE AS uclc_ucm_code , UCLC_UM_CODE AS uclc_um_code , UCLC_TYPE AS uclc_type , DATE_FORMAT(UCLC_REGDATE, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS uclc_regdate FROM TBL_CONTENTS_LIKE_COMMENT WHERE UCLC_UCM_CODE = #{uclc_ucm_code} AND UCLC_UM_CODE = #{um_code}
SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UM_CODE = #{uml_um_code} AND UME_UCM_CODE NOT IN (#{ume_ucm_code}) AND UME_STATUS = 'A' AND DATE(UME_INPUT_DATE) = DATE(NOW());
SELECT COUNT(UME_CODE) FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UM_CODE = #{uml_um_code} AND UME_UCM_CODE = #{ume_ucm_code} AND UME_STATUS = 'A' AND DATE(UME_INPUT_DATE) = DATE(NOW());
SELECT UIS_MAX_LIBRARY_IN_BOOK FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER WHERE UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK_HISTORY ( UMEH_CODE, UMEH_UML_CODE, UMEH_UM_CODE, UMEH_UCM_CODE, UMEH_UDR_CODE, UMEH_SEQ, UMEH_LAST_READ_PERCENT, UMEH_LAST_READ_IDX, UMEH_LAST_READ_POSITION, UMEH_WEB_LAST_READ_PERCENT, UMEH_WEB_LAST_READ_IDX, UMEH_WEB_LAST_READ_POSITION, UMEH_LAST_READ_DATE, UMEH_FINISHREAD_COUNT, UMEH_FINISHREAD_DATE, UMEH_READ_STATUS, UMEH_ISLOCK, UMEH_PASSWORD, UMEH_STATUS, UMEH_ISDOWNLOAD, UMEH_DOWNLOAD_DATE, UMEH_RATE, UMEH_RATE_MEMO, UMEH_MOD_DATE, UMEH_INPUT_DATE, UMEH_REGDATE, UMEH_UMD_UID, UMEH_HISTORYDATE ) (SELECT *, NOW() FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UM_CODE = #{uml_um_code} AND
UME_UCM_CODE = #{ume_ucm_code} )
mapper.select: SELECT UME_CODE AS ume_code FROM TBL_MEMBER_LIBRARY_BOOK WHERE UME_UM_CODE = #{uml_um_code} AND UME_UCM_CODE = #{ume_ucm_code}

SELECT COUNT(UEM_CODE) AS count FROM TBL_EVENT_MASTER event_master LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UEE_UEM_CODE FROM TBL_EVENT_EXCLUDE WHERE UEE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} AND UEE_DEL_YN = 'N' ) V ON V.UEE_UEM_CODE = event_master.UEM_CODE WHERE V.UEE_UEM_CODE is null AND UEM_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= NOW() AND ( UEM_UIS_CODE IS NULL OR UEM_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} )
SELECT count(UEM_UIS_CODE) FROM TBL_EVENT_MASTER WHERE UEM_CODE = #{uem_code}
SELECT count(UEMC_CODE) FROM TBL_EVENT_COMMENT WHERE UEMC_UEM_CODE = #{uem_code} AND UEMC_UM_CODE = #{um_code}
SELECT COUNT(UEMC_CODE) AS count FROM TBL_EVENT_COMMENT WHERE UEMC_UEM_CODE = #{uem_code}

SELECT UEMC_CODE AS uemc_code , UEMC_UM_CODE AS uemc_um_code , UEMC_UM_USERID AS uemc_um_userid , UEMC_COMMENT AS uemc_comment , DATE_FORMAT(UEMC_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uemc_regdate FROM TBL_EVENT_COMMENT AS comment WHERE UEMC_UEM_CODE = #{uem_code} ORDER BY comment.UEMC_REGDATE desc LIMIT #{pagenum}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(UEMC_CODE) AS count FROM TBL_EVENT_COMMENT WHERE UEMC_UEM_CODE = #{uem_code} AND UEMC_UM_CODE = #{um_code}

SELECT UEMC_CODE AS uemc_code , UEMC_UM_CODE AS uemc_um_code , UEMC_UM_USERID AS uemc_um_userid , UEMC_COMMENT AS uemc_comment , DATE_FORMAT(UEMC_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uemc_regdate FROM TBL_EVENT_COMMENT AS comment WHERE UEMC_UEM_CODE = #{uem_code} AND UEMC_UM_CODE = #{um_code} ORDER BY comment.UEMC_REGDATE desc

SELECT count(*) as count FROM TBL_EVENT_CONTENT event_content INNER JOIN TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER contents_master ON event_content.UEC_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE
JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS return_contents ON contents_master.UCM_CODE = return_contents.URC_UCM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UCE_UCM_CODE FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE WHERE UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) V ON V.UCE_UCM_CODE = contents_master.UCM_CODE WHERE V.uce_ucm_code is null AND event_content.UEC_UEM_CODE = #{uem_code} AND contents_master.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND contents_master.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y'
AND return_contents.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}

SELECT UEM_CODE AS uem_code , UEM_TITLE AS uem_title , UEM_THUMBNAIL_IMAGE AS uem_thumbnail_image , UEM_URL AS uem_url , DATE_FORMAT(UEM_DISPLAY_STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uem_display_startdate , DATE_FORMAT(UEM_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uem_display_enddate , UEM_UIS_USERID AS uem_uis_userid , UEM_USEYN AS uem_useyn , UEM_TYPE AS uem_type , UEM_DISPLAY_NUMBER AS uem_display_number , DATE_FORMAT(UEM_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uem_regdate , TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'),DATE_FORMAT(UEM_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS date_diff FROM TBL_EVENT_MASTER event_master INNER JOIN TBL_EVENT_CONTENT event_content ON event_master.UEM_CODE = event_content.UEC_UEM_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UEE_UEM_CODE FROM TBL_EVENT_EXCLUDE WHERE UEE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} AND UEE_DEL_YN = 'N' ) V ON V.UEE_UEM_CODE = event_master.UEM_CODE WHERE V.UEE_UEM_CODE is null AND event_content.UEC_UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} AND event_master.UEM_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= NOW() AND event_master.UEM_DISPLAY_ENDDATE >= NOW() AND event_master.UEM_USEYN = 'Y' AND event_master.UEM_BOOK_YN = 'Y' AND ( event_master.UEM_UIS_CODE IS NULL OR event_master.UEM_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) ORDER BY event_master.UEM_DISPLAY_NUMBER ASC;

SELECT library_master.uil_code AS uil_code , library_master.uil_name AS uil_name , inst_master.UIS_USE_ADULT_BOOK AS uis_use_adult_book ,( SELECT COUNT(A.UIE_UIL_CODE) AS uie_uis_count FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK A WHERE library_master.UIL_CODE = A.UIE_UIL_CODE ) AS book_count FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_MASTER library_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EBOOK library_ebook ON library_master.UIL_CODE = library_ebook.UIE_UIL_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER inst_master ON inst_master.uis_code = library_master.uil_uis_code WHERE library_ebook.UIE_UCM_CODE = #{ucm_code} -- 상품코드
AND library_master.UIL_UIS_CODE in (#{uis_code},'') -- 큐레이션 공통 포함 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_LIBRARY_EXCLUDE sub_exclude WHERE sub_exclude.UILE_UIL_CODE = library_master.UIL_CODE AND sub_exclude.UILE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} -- 공통 큐레이션 제외기관 제외 )
AND library_master.UIL_UIS_CODE in (#{uis_code}) -- 큐레이션 단독인 경우
AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND library_master.UIL_DISPLAY_ENDDATE >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
AND library_master.UIL_CODE NOT IN ('UIL0000000115') -- 해당 UIL_CODE 는 선착순 도서 큐레이션으로 사용안하므로 제외
ORDER BY library_master.uil_regdate desc limit 1;

SELECT UEM_CODE AS uem_code , UEM_TITLE AS uem_title , UEM_THUMBNAIL_IMAGE AS uem_thumbnail_image , UEM_URL AS uem_url , DATE_FORMAT(UEM_DISPLAY_STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uem_display_startdate , DATE_FORMAT(UEM_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uem_display_enddate , UEM_UIS_USERID AS uem_uis_userid , UEM_USEYN AS uem_useyn , UEM_TYPE AS uem_type , UEM_DISPLAY_NUMBER AS uem_display_number , DATE_FORMAT(UEM_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS uem_regdate , TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d'),DATE_FORMAT(UEM_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS date_diff FROM TBL_EVENT_MASTER event_master LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT UEE_UEM_CODE FROM TBL_EVENT_EXCLUDE WHERE UEE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} AND UEE_DEL_YN = 'N' ) V ON V.UEE_UEM_CODE = event_master.UEM_CODE WHERE V.UEE_UEM_CODE is null AND UEM_DISPLAY_STARTDATE <= NOW() AND UEM_USEYN = 'Y' AND ( UEM_UIS_CODE IS NULL OR UEM_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) AND STR_TO_DATE(UEM_DISPLAY_ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= NOW() ORDER BY UEM_DISPLAY_NUMBER ASC

SELECT UCT_CODE AS uct_code, UCT_PARENT AS uct_parent, UCT_NAME AS uct_name, UCT_DEPTH AS uct_depth, UCT_TYPE AS uct_type, UCT_PRIORTY AS uct_priorty, UCT_UCP_CODE AS uct_ucp_code FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER WHERE UCT_TYPE != 'C' AND UCT_DEPTH = 0
UNION SELECT UCT_CODE, UCT_PARENT, UCT_NAME, UCT_DEPTH, UCT_TYPE, UCT_PRIORTY, UCT_UCP_CODE FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER WHERE UCT_PARENT = (SELECT UCT_PARENT FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER WHERE UCT_CODE = #{uct_code})
ORDER BY UCT_CODE, UCT_PRIORTY ASC

SELECT DISTINCT category.UCT_CODE AS uct_code, category.UCT_PARENT AS uct_parent, category.UCT_NAME AS uct_name, category.UCT_DEPTH AS uct_depth, category.UCT_TYPE AS uct_type, category.UCT_PRIORTY AS uct_priorty FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category WHERE category.UCT_DEPTH = 0 AND category.UCT_TYPE = #{uct_type} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER content
INNER JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS rc ON rc.URC_UCM_CODE = content.UCM_CODE AND rc.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
WHERE content.UCM_MAIN_CODE = category.UCT_MAIN_CODE AND content.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND content.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y'
AND content.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND content.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE e WHERE e.UCE_UCM_CODE = content.UCM_CODE AND e.UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) )
ORDER BY category.UCT_CODE, category.UCT_PRIORTY ASC
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT category.UCT_CODE AS uct_code, category.UCT_PARENT AS uct_parent, category.UCT_NAME AS uct_name, category.UCT_DEPTH AS uct_depth, category.UCT_TYPE AS uct_type, category.UCT_PRIORTY AS uct_priorty FROM TBL_CATEGORY_MASTER category WHERE category.UCT_DEPTH = 1 AND category.UCT_TYPE = #{uct_type} AND category.UCT_PARENT = #{uct_parent} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_CONTENTS_MASTER content
INNER JOIN TBL_RETURN_CONTENTS rc ON rc.URC_UCM_CODE = content.UCM_CODE AND rc.URC_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code}
WHERE content.UCM_UCT_CODE = category.UCT_CODE AND content.UCM_STATUS = 'S' AND content.UCM_SVRYN = 'Y'
AND content.UCM_UCP_CODE = #{uis_ucp_code}
AND content.UCM_COPY_BOOK_FLAG = 'N'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_CONTENTS_EXCLUDE e WHERE e.UCE_UCM_CODE = content.UCM_CODE AND e.UCE_UIS_CODE = #{uis_code} ) ) ORDER BY UCT_CODE, UCT_PRIORTY ASC
